page_metadata.biotools__summary: Detection of copy number variants (CNV) from exome sequencing samples, including unpaired samples.  The package implements a hidden Markov model which uses positional covariates, such as background read depth and GC-content, to simultaneously normalize and segment the samples into regions of constant copy count.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Detection of copy number variants (CNV) from exome sequencing samples, including unpaired samples.  The package implements a hidden Markov model which uses positional covariates, such as background read depth and GC-content, to simultaneously normalize and segment the samples into regions of constant copy count.
